_note: Advisory baseline for the OTA publish gate (scripts/publish-ota.sh). It records the @expo/fingerprint hash of the project at the last native build. If the live fingerprint differs, the project's native layer changed and an OTA bundle would be incompatible with shipped binaries — rebuild natively, bump app.json > runtimeVersion, and re-seed this file (scripts/publish-ota.sh --seed). RE-SEED REQUIRED after the FIRST expo-updates-enabled native build: this baseline was captured before that build's `expo prebuild` wired expo-updates into ios/android, so the hash will change once.
